insight_events.title: Core business accelerating
insight_events.summary: Core operating metrics (revenues, cfo) are accelerating together — growth moved from +53.4% to +52.3% YoY for two consecutive quarters. Trailing-twelve-month growth confirms the same direction. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
insight_events.why_it_matters: Positive evidence. May change earnings power, cash generation, or the valuation range.
insight_events.recommended_follow_up: Compare this development with the thesis, falsifiers, and valuation assumptions.

insight_events.title: Growth regime upshift
insight_events.summary: Growth regime upshift: YoY growth moved to +31.4% to +52.3% YoY (baseline median +6.4% YoY) for two consecutive quarters. Source: SEC XBRL quarterly filings.
